calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Scott Hughes, CSR #12365.

Brian F. Kram, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 155 Montgomery Street Associates, LLC.
Katherine Rudolph-Darling, Assistant Asset Manager for plaintif, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Anthony K. Henry, dba Caffe Amici Espresso, or Maria Alcazar, dba Caffe Amici Espresso.
Default was entered against defendant Maria Alcazar, dba Caffe Amici Espresso on October 28, 2010.
Defendant Anthony K. Henry, dba Caffe Amici Espresso, filed an answer to the complaint on October 27, 2010.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 3, 2010.

Exhibit--1--1 page letter w/attachments from Anthony K. Henry to
Katherine Rudolph-Darling re: Bankruptcy Court Case......................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--2--Retail Lease dated 1/10/06...............................................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--3--Lease Amendment Number One dated 5/22/09.................................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--4--Lease Amendment Number Two dated 9/28/09.................................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--5--Storage Facility Lease Agreement dated 3/16/07...........................ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff 155 Montgomery Street Associates, LLC, and against defendants Anthony K. Henry and Maria Alcazar, dba Caffe Amici Espresso, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $72,037.40.
Holdover Damages - $14,901.48.
Attorney Fees - $5,250.00.
Costs - $595.00.

Total - $92,783.88.

Additionally, plaintiff 155 Montgomery Street, LLC is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 155 Montgomery Street, Suite 161, San Francisco, CA. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Assigned To Trial Court
